title: Bootstrap outcomes-mcp: Codemode MCP server for the Open Outcome rubric
question: Does a Cloudflare Worker, wrapping the Open Outcome HeuristicVerifier with @cloudflare/codemode, serve an MCP code tool that runs model-written JavaScript in a Worker Loader sandbox and returns a Verdict?
success_criteria: wrangler dev serves a streamable HTTP MCP endpoint on localhost:8787
tools/list returns exactly one code tool whose description carries the typed verifier surface
calling code with await codemode.verify_outcome_pair returns a Verdict that matches the Python verifier

capabilities: wrangler dev streamable HTTP MCP endpoint
tools list exposes single code tool with typed surface
code tool executes JavaScript in Worker Loader sandbox returning a Verdict
